text: I appreciate your patience with it all. So I do a posterior approach. It's what I've always done. I did it laparoscopically when I switched over to robotics. I just never got rid of it and been real happy with it.

You'll see that I pass things to myself a whole lot, and I found that to be a real advantage during the case.

This is not looking for an erectile response. This is looking at a compound motor action potential. So when you stimulate a nerve, with a certain signal. It sends that signal down the nerve.
